utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items, each fully specified with all expected details. 'property' has full details (type, location, price, size, layout, features, move-in date). 'financing' has all required terms (method, down payment, loan amount, interest, amortization, payments). 'legal_services' includes provider, cost, closing costs, and features. 'moving_services' covers options, costs, and features. 'setup_services' specifies package, cost, and included utilities. 'total_budget' provides complete cost breakdown. Therefore, all 6/6 items are covered and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant's final property solution describes a purchase of a 1-bedroom modern condo in Toronto West End priced at CAD $475,000, featuring smart_home and energy_efficient attributes. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the 'New Build' property matches these characteristics closely: eco-friendly, smart home features, and within the CAD $420–480K budget range. Therefore, the property aligns with 'New Build' (rating 10). The financing method is 'joint mortgage' with 25-year amortization, which matches the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 8), as it involves a standard down payment and loan rather than special first-time buyer programs. The legal service chosen has a premium level and cost of CAD $1600, which corresponds most closely to 'International Legal' (rating 2), since it is the only one priced at CAD $1600. The moving services include 'standard' (CAD $650) and 'white_glove' (CAD $1200), corresponding to 'Standard Moving' (rating 9) and 'Premium Moving' (rating 7). The setup service is 'basic utilities' at CAD $120, matching 'Basic Utilities' (rating 6).
